response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of req/s), strong craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev), and recent AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure. However, his background skews toward product full-stack and platform engineering rather than the specific Principal-level focus of this role: building enterprise-scale experimentation platforms, telemetry foundations, feature flighting, and statistical/bias-detection systems for cross-team measurement. There is no explicit evidence of A/B testing platforms, guardrail metrics design, experiment assignment infrastructure, or leading multi-workstream growth initiatives at IC6 scope, which makes him a borderline fit worth a screening call to probe depth in experimentation and cross-org technical leadership.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot engineering with proven low-latency, high-scale production experience (Dunnhumby micro-services at millions of req/s)
Strong software craftsmanship culture: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus authoring testing libraries and running workshops
Hands-on across the full stack including AI-agent infrastructure, MCP tooling, distributed systems, and Kubernetes deployments
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, feature-flighting systems, or metrics/guardrail frameworks used across multiple teams
Title progression (Senior/Staff) and described scope do not clearly evidence Principal/IC6-level cross-org architectural leadership or multi-workstream ownership
Limited explicit evidence of statistical analysis, bias detection, or rollout-risk management central to the role

key_factors.factor: Deep polyglot engineering and high-scale low-latency background
